goal: Identify the CAUSAL contribution of LLM reasoning to stock-movement onset detection on a LEAKAGE-FREE substrate (2025 A-shares, where we proved the LLM's memory channel is null: no-context accuracy = 48.6% = chance). The field's 'LLM helps' results are unidentified (memory + reasoning confounded); on leakage-free data the contribution is identified. Deliverables: (1) a leakage-validity-gated identification estimator of LLM contribution, (2) LLM-as-weak-supervisor distillation with clean attribution, (3) a leakage-calibrated de-biasing estimator that corrects contaminated US-benchmark scores. The contribution is MEASUREMENT/IDENTIFICATION, not predictive performance.
env: Use .venv-xpu (Python 3.11 + torch-xpu). Reuse existing scored data so real experiments cost $0: results/poc_full/predictions.parquet (A-share LLM raw/expert scores + _fwd_r5 + ts_code/trade_date), results/e3_*/ (FinBen + A-share no-context), src/eval_e3 (add_lgbm), src/evaluation/onset_eval.py (clustered bootstrap), src/onset/{pu_labels,weak_supervision}.py, src/train_onset_real.py.
acceptanceCriteria: verifyCommand (pytest tests/algo) passes
Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic, <5s, CPU, no network) that fails before the deliverable exists

REAL-experiment tasks: the hermetic SMOKE test is green AND the real experiment has been run and its results/identify/<...>/stats.json committed; the numeric FINDING (including a null/zero estimate) is RECORDED, never gates completion (SIGN-R1)
Every identified estimate carries a date-clustered 95% CI and a stated leakage-validity check (SIGN-R3)
No new LLM API spend unless a task explicitly says so (SIGN-R2)

tasks.title: Leakage-validity test (the identification precondition)
tasks.rationale: Identification requires the LLM memory channel ~ 0. Formalize the no-context-at-chance probe as a checkable precondition.
acceptanceCriteria: leakage_validity(no_ctx_acc, no_ctx_ci, chance=0.5) returns {holds: bool, margin, reason}
holds=True iff the no-context accuracy CI does NOT lie above chance (memory channel null) -- A-share case
holds=False when no-context >> chance (US/contaminated case)
hermetic synthetic test for both cases
tasks.notes: DONE: src/identify/leakage_validity.py (holds iff no-context CI lower bound <= chance). Verified on REAL data: A-share holds=True (margin -0.014), ACL18 holds=False (margin +0.233). 4 hermetic tests green.

tasks.title: Identified LLM-contribution estimator
tasks.rationale: On leakage-free data, the LLM's incremental predictive content beyond a tabular baseline is the identified reasoning contribution.
acceptanceCriteria: incremental_contribution(baseline_score, llm_score, target, dates) returns the identified incremental rank-IC of the LLM beyond the baseline (e.g. rank-IC of LLM residualized on baseline, or combined-minus-baseline) with a date-clustered 95% CI (reuse onset_eval.clustered_bootstrap)
synthetic: when LLM carries signal beyond baseline -> estimate > 0; when LLM = baseline + noise -> CI spans 0
hermetic
tasks.notes: DONE: src/identify/contribution.py — partial_rank_corr (LLM vs target controlling for baseline, on ranks) + incremental_contribution (date-clustered CI). 3 hermetic tests green (positive when LLM adds signal, CI spans 0 when redundant).

tasks.title: REAL: identified LLM contribution on leakage-free A-shares
tasks.rationale: The first IDENTIFIED (not confounded) estimate of LLM value-add in stock onset prediction. Likely ~0 -- that is itself the key finding.
acceptanceCriteria: uses results/poc_full/predictions.parquet (A-share LLM raw_p_up/expert_p_up + _fwd_r5) and the LGBM baseline (reuse src/agent/eval_hybrid.add_lgbm_predictions)
checks leakage_validity (ID1) using the A-share no-context result (results/e3_ashare/summary.json); records holds=True
writes results/identify/ashare/stats.json with leakage_validity + identified contribution (raw & expert) with clustered CI vs _fwd_r5
hermetic smoke test on synthetic is green; the real run is executed and stats.json committed; the finding (incl. null) recorded in progress.md
$0 new LLM cost
tasks.notes: Depends ID1, ID2. SIGN-R1: do not gate on the estimate being nonzero.

tasks.title: LLM -> labeling-function adapter
tasks.rationale: Use the LLM as a weak supervisor (knowledge injector), not a predictor: turn its signals into labeling functions feeding the T-002 label model.
acceptanceCriteria: llm_to_lf(df, thresholds) maps LLM signals (p_up, pump_ratio, expert onset_score) to votes in {-1,0,+1} (0=abstain)
output is a valid N x K LF matrix consumable by src/onset/weak_supervision.label_model
hermetic synthetic test; abstains handled

tasks.title: REAL: LLM-as-weak-supervisor distillation, clean attribution
tasks.rationale: Does LLM KNOWLEDGE (not memory) improve a downstream onset detector? On leakage-free data the improvement is cleanly attributable.
acceptanceCriteria: two arms: onset detector trained with fixed-horizon labels only vs labels augmented by LLM-derived weak supervision (WS1 + weak_supervision.label_model)
reuse the src/train_onset_real.py machinery; evaluate held-out with clustered RankIC (onset_eval)
writes results/identify/distill/stats.json with both arms + the identified improvement + clustered CIs
hermetic smoke green; real run executed + stats committed; improvement (incl. null) recorded
$0 new LLM cost
tasks.notes: Depends WS1, ID1. Keep modest (XPU, few minutes).

tasks.title: Leakage-calibrated de-biasing estimator
tasks.rationale: Context HURTS on memorized US data but can only help on clean A-shares; use the clean context-effect as a reference to subtract the memorization component from contaminated US scores. Exports value to the whole field.
acceptanceCriteria: debias_accuracy(us_full, us_nocontext, clean_full, clean_nocontext, chance=0.5) returns a memorization-corrected 'reasoning' accuracy estimate for the contaminated market, with the stated calibration assumption
synthetic with a known memorization component -> estimator recovers the reasoning part
hermetic
tasks.notes: State the comparability assumption explicitly in the docstring.

tasks.title: REAL: de-bias the FinBen US benchmark scores
tasks.rationale: Apply the de-biasing estimator to the real FinBen results using the A-share calibration.
acceptanceCriteria: reads results/e3_{acl,bigdata,cikm}/leakage_summary.json (full + no-context) and results/e3_ashare/summary.json (clean calibration)
writes results/identify/debias/finben_corrected.json with per-benchmark corrected reasoning estimates
hermetic smoke green; real run executed + output committed
$0 new LLM cost

tasks.title: Synthesis: identification results table + figure
tasks.rationale: Aggregate the identified A-share contribution (ID3), the distillation attribution (WS2), and the FinBen de-biasing (DB2) into one paper-ready table + figure.
acceptanceCriteria: reads the three results/identify/* artifacts and writes results/identify/summary.md + paper/sections/figures/identify_summary.png
hermetic smoke green; real run executed + figure committed
tasks.notes: Depends ID3, WS2, DB2. LAST task.

tasks.title: (OPTIONAL) Counterfactual prompt-intervention attribution
tasks.rationale: Perturb prompt components (drop factor / flip signal / anonymize) and measure the causal effect on the LLM prediction, validated against unmemorizable future returns. Direction 4.
acceptanceCriteria: perturbation harness + attribution; validity only under leakage-free data
REQUIRES new A-share LLM scoring (cost) -> needs human approval
tasks.skipReason: Requires new LLM API calls (cost); needs human approval before the loop incurs spend. Flip skip:false to enable.
